title: No Damage Hearts
description: Just a simple Resource Pack to remove those annoying damage hearts
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

Just a simple Resource Pack that removes the damage hearts particles.

I made this to make my SAO Particles mod look a bit better.

 

If you want to get updates on the pack development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
